dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track your schedule from one place: monitor appointment volume, review upcoming availability, and follow planner activity in the live calendar.

calendar.title: Calendar Overview
calendar.subtitle: Track open slots and booked appointments in a single timeline.
calendar.name: Name
calendar.filterHint: Click on labels to toggle visibility

dashboard.changePasswordWarning: Please change your default password for security.
dashboard.passwordRequirements: At least 10 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
dashboard.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
dashboard.languageDescription: Choose the system language. All interface and error messages will be displayed in the selected language.
dashboard.adminEmailDescription: Set the email address used for admin notifications sent by the system.

slots.title: Available Time Slots
slots.description: Create and manage your availability windows. Enable or disable slots, rename them, and keep your booking schedule up to date.
slots.empty: No slots yet. Click "Add Slot" to create one.
slots.name: Slot Name
slots.startEndRequired: Slot name, start time, and end time are required

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.description: Review all bookings, filter by status, and take action when needed by canceling active appointments or cleaning up past records.
appointments.caldavConflictDetected: Remote CalDAV event changed since the last sync

links.title: Booking Links
links.description: Generate shareable booking links, choose which slots are visible, and control validity periods for each link.
links.empty: No links yet. Create one to share.
links.selectAtLeastOneSlot: Please select at least one slot
links.requiresApproval: Require admin approval for all bookings

booking.invalidMessage: This booking link is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
booking.successMessage: A confirmation email with calendar details has been sent.
booking.successMessagePending: Your appointment request has been sent for admin approval. You will be notified via email once it is approved.
booking.title: Book Appointment
booking.subtitle: Select an available time slot and fill in your information.
booking.emailHelp: If you add an email, you can cancel your appointment, and you will be notified if an admin cancels it. After booking, an email is also sent with a link to add the appointment to your calendar.
booking.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
booking.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time
booking.outsideSlot: Selected range cannot exceed available time
booking.occupiedTimes: Occupied time ranges in this slot
booking.noOccupiedTimes: No active appointments inside this slot.
booking.overlapOccupied: Selected range overlaps an occupied time range
booking.emailRequiredForApproval: Email is required because this booking needs admin approval

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure security, language, notification preferences, calendar sharing, and export options to match your workflow.
settings.passwordRequirements: At least 10 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
settings.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
settings.changePasswordWarning: Please change your default password for security.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the system language. All interface and error messages will be displayed in the selected language.
settings.adminEmailDescription: Set the email address used for admin notifications sent by the system.
settings.calendarSharingDescription: When enabled, your calendar (slots, appointments, and planner events) can be viewed by anyone with the public link.
settings.pushNotificationsDescription: Enable or disable browser push notifications for new bookings and cancellations.
settings.emailNotificationsDescription: Enable or disable email notifications for bookings and cancellations.
settings.emailNotificationsRequiresAdminEmail: Set an admin email first to enable email notifications.
settings.caldavDescription: Connect a CalDAV account to import busy times anonymously and choose the calendar used for approved booking write-back.
settings.caldavPasswordHint: The password is encrypted before it is stored on the server.
settings.caldavPasswordStoredHint: A password is already stored. Leave this blank to keep the existing secret.
settings.caldavPasswordPlaceholderStored: Leave blank to keep the stored password
settings.caldavWritableCalendarDescription: Approved booking-calendar appointments will be written to this calendar.
settings.caldavConnectionSuccess: CalDAV connection succeeded and calendars were loaded
settings.caldavRetryNoop: No pending CalDAV sync work was found
settings.caldavDegradedModeEnabled: Degraded mode is active because the failure threshold was reached
settings.caldavQueueEmpty: No queued CalDAV items right now.
settings.caldavRepairBlockedByPolicy: CalDAV write-back is disabled by the current sync policy

caldavRepairAction.refresh_etag: Remote CalDAV ETag refreshed and sync retried

settings.webhookDescription: Configure signed outbound events and inbound command execution for external system integrations.
settings.webhookOutboundDescription: Publish slot, appointment, link, planner, community event, and push changes to an external webhook endpoint.
settings.webhookSecretHint: Signature header format: sha256=<hmac>. Minimum 16 characters.
settings.webhookSecretConfigured: A secret is already configured. Leave empty to keep it unchanged.
settings.webhookSecretHiddenHint: Stored secrets are hidden after refresh for security. Enter a new value only if you want to replace it.
settings.webhookInboundDescription: Allow signed external systems to run approved actions inside Booking Calendar without sharing the admin session.
settings.webhookInboundEndpointHint: Send signed POST requests to this endpoint with action, params, and data fields.
settings.webhookInboundSecretHint: Use the same sha256=<hmac> header format based on timestamp.body. Minimum 16 characters.
settings.webhookInboundSecretPlaceholder: Paste the secret used by the external command sender
settings.webhookInboundSecretConfigured: An inbound secret is already configured. Leave empty to keep it unchanged.
settings.webhookInboundSecretHiddenHint: Stored inbound secrets are hidden after refresh for security. Enter a new value only if you want to replace it.
settings.webhookInboundScopesHint: Only the checked action groups can be executed by inbound webhook commands.
settings.versionDescription: See your current app version and check if a newer GitHub release is available.
settings.themeColorsDescription: Customize all interface colors. Save your palette to apply it across the app.
settings.themeDeveloperHint: Developer view lets you edit all colors as JSON in one go.
settings.themeDeveloperInvalid: Developer JSON is invalid. Please provide all color keys with valid values.
settings.icsExportDescription: Export your calendar as an ICS file. You can export all events or select a date range.

planner.title: Planner
planner.pageDescription: Plan internal events and blocked times that should appear on your calendar, separate from customer appointments.
planner.empty: No events yet. Click "Add Event" to create one.
planner.fieldsRequired: Event title, start time, and end time are required

common.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
common.confirmDisableMessage: Are you sure you want to disable this item?
common.confirmCancelMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
common.confirmRejectMessage: Are you sure you want to reject this appointment?
common.invalidDateRange: Start date must be before end date
common.noResults: No items found matching your filters.

communityEvents.title: Community Events
communityEvents.pageDescription: Create events that require community approvals, share approval links, and track approval progress until events become active.
communityEvents.fieldsRequired: Event title, start time, and end time are required
communityEvents.fullNameInvalid: Please enter your first and last name in one field
communityEvents.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
communityEvents.alreadyApprovedLocal: You have already approved this event from this browser.
